2604.18364.title: Training and Agentic Inference Strategies for LLM-based Manim Animation Generation
2604.18364.paper_summary: Generating programmatic animation using libraries such as Manim presents unique challenges for Large Language Models (LLMs), requiring spatial reasoning, temporal sequencing, and familiarity with domain-specific APIs that are underrepresented in general pre-training data. A systematic study of how training and inference strategies interact in this setting is lacking in current research. This study introduces ManimTrainer, a training pipeline that combines Supervised Fine-tuning (SFT) with Reinforcement Learning (RL) based Group Relative Policy Optimisation (GRPO) using a unified reward signal that fuses code and visual assessment signals, and ManimAgent, an inference pipeline featuring Renderer-in-the-loop (RITL) and API documentation-augmented RITL (RITL-DOC) strategies. Using these techniques, this study presents the first unified training and inference study for text-to-code-to-video transformation with Manim. It evaluates 17 open-source sub-30B LLMs across nine combinations of training and inference strategies using ManimBench. Results show that SFT generally improves code quality, while GRPO enhances visual outputs and increases the models' responsiveness to extrinsic signals during self-correction at inference time. The Qwen 3 Coder 30B model with GRPO and RITL-DOC achieved the highest overall performance, with a 94% Render Success Rate (RSR) and 85.7% Visual Similarity (VS) to reference videos, surpassing the baseline GPT-4.1 model by +3 percentage points in VS. Additionally, the analysis shows that the correlation between code and visual metrics strengthens with SFT and GRPO but weakens with inference-time enhancements, highlighting the complementary roles of training and agentic inference strategies in Manim animation generation.
2604.18364.paper_summary_zh: 生成程式動畫使用如 Manim 等庫對大型語言模型 (LLMs) 提出了獨特的挑戰，這需要空間推理、時間序列安排以及對於在一般預訓練數據中較少代表的領域特定 API 的熟悉。當前研究中缺乏對於這種情境下訓練和推理策略互動的系統性研究。本研究介紹了 ManimTrainer，一個結合了監督微調 (SFT) 和基於強化學習 (RL) 的群體相對政策優化 (GRPO) 的訓練管道，使用一個統一的獎勵信號，融合了代碼和視覺評估信號，以及 ManimAgent，一個具有循環渲染器 (RITL) 和增強 API 文檔的 RITL (RITL-DOC) 策略的推理管道。使用這些技術，本研究呈現了首個針對文本到代碼再到視頻轉換的統一訓練和推理研究，並使用 ManimBench 評估了 17 個開源的子 30B LLMs，涵蓋九種訓練和推理策略的組合。結果顯示，SFT 通常改善了代碼質量，而 GRPO 則增強了視覺輸出並提高了模型在推理時自我修正過程中對外部信號的反應能力。搭載 GRPO 和 RITL-DOC 的 Qwen 3 Coder 30B 模型達到了最高的整體性能，擁有 94% 的渲染成功率 (RSR) 和 85.7% 的視覺相似度 (VS) 與參考視頻相比，超過了基準的 GPT-4.1 模型在 VS 上高出 3 個百分點。此外，分析顯示代碼和視覺指標之間的相關性隨著 SFT 和 GRPO 的增強而加強，但在推理時增強下卻減弱，突顯了訓練和代理推理策略在 Manim 動畫生成中的互補角色。
2604.18364.author: Ravidu Suien Rammuni Silva et.al.
2604.18364.authors: Ravidu Suien Rammuni Silva, Ahmad Lotfi, Isibor Kennedy Ihianle, Golnaz Shahtahmassebi, Jordan J. Bird
